text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 207 

ICL_APPLY 

LABEL: How Part D Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) is applied 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether plan applies the Medicare-defined Part D Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) 
Amount. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: ICL_APPLY 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: 1 = Medicare-defined Amount 
 2 = Plan-defined Amount 
 3 = No ICL 

COMMENT: The
